mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reports (user_id, target_type, target_id, reason) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{reason})
mapper.update: UPDATE reports SET status = #{status}, handle_remark = #{handleRemark}, handler_id = #{handlerId}, handled_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COALESCE( AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, created_at, handled_at)) / 3600.0, 0 ) FROM reports WHERE status = 1 AND handled_at IS NOT NULL
